title: Rich Korean Chinese Long Beans Stir-fry
description: A rich and crispy Korean-Chinese dish featuring gluten-free Chinese long beans slow-cooked with a blend of savory sauces for a romantic meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add shallots, garlic, and ginger. Stir-fry until fragrant and translucent.
Add Chinese long beans to the wok. Stir for about 2 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix cornstarch with a little bit of water to create a slurry.
Pour the slurry into the wok, stirring quickly to combine with the ingredients.
Add soya sauce and fish sauce (oyster sauce) evenly across the wok. Stir-fry for an additional 2 minutes or until sauce thickens slightly.
Turn off heat and serve immediately.
